---
title: "My Favorite Digital Tools"
---

These are three tools that I often use for coding, learning, and productivity.

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 .tool-card}
### Python
Python is a popular programming language used for data analysis, visualization, automation, and machine learning.

I like Python because it is easy to read and very useful for many kinds of projects.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 .tool-card}
### GitHub
GitHub is a platform where people store, manage, and share code.

I use GitHub to organize projects, save version history, and collaborate with others.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 .tool-card}
### ChatGPT
ChatGPT is an AI assistant that helps with writing, brainstorming, coding, and explaining difficult topics.

I like using ChatGPT because it helps me work faster and learn in a more interactive way.
:::
:::

## Final Thoughts
These tools support different parts of my workflow. Python helps me build things, GitHub helps me manage them, and ChatGPT helps me think and learn.
